title: Home
text:
Overview
This site serves as a professional home for my academic work, teaching materials, and selected Quarto-based research reports. It is designed to make technical work easier to browse, interpret, and share.


Research
My interests include psychometrics, social identity processes, multilevel modeling, mediation, SEM, and the communication of quantitative results in clear and usable formats.


Teaching
I develop graduate-level materials in statistics, psychometrics, and research methods, with an emphasis on conceptual clarity and applied workflows in R.


Reproducible Workflows
I use Quarto, R, and related tools to build reproducible analysis documents, dashboards, and reporting systems that are both technically robust and easy to navigate.

title: Home
text:
Approach






NoteWhy this site exists



I am especially interested in making technical quantitative work more interpretable without sacrificing rigor. This site brings together professional materials and analysis reports in a format that supports both transparency and accessibility.
